items.title: US attorney general criticised after saying all Epstein files have been released
items.dek: Lawmakers, including those who wrote the law requiring their publication, argue the release is insufficient.

items.title: Reddick's Daytona 500 win a buzzer beater befitting of his boss: Michael Jordan
items.dek: Thanks to a buzzer-beater move befitting of Michael Jordan, Tyler Reddick won the biggest race in NASCAR.
items.body: Thanks to a buzzer-beater move befitting of Michael Jordan, Tyler Reddick won the biggest race in NASCAR.
